text.title: writing-design-documents Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for writing-design-documents as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLM generates balanced alternatives tables that favor the first option introduced.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Human validation required to confirm the winning option is genuinely better, not just listed first. Write the alternatives table before writing the decision to avoid anchoring bias.

failure-mode.description: Design doc authored entirely by LLM without human review of trade-off tables.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs produce biased decisions when generating both the options and the conclusion. The alternatives table must be validated by a human or a second-pass review agent.

failure-mode.description: File structure section listing non-existent files.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Executor agents create orphaned files or skip critical ones when the file list is aspirational rather than validated. Verify every listed file against the actual codebase.
